summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Trust Series I (QQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index, a modified-market-cap-weighted index of 100 NASDAQ-listed stocks. QQQ was launched on Mar 10, 1999 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Stock Market Today: SPY, QQQ Retreat on Iran’s New Threat ahead of Trump’s Primetime Address
data.text: Both the S&P 500 ETF ($SPY) and the Nasdaq 100 ETF ($QQQ) closed lower on Thursday as investors assessed new U.S.-Iran developments ahead of President Trump’s primetime address later tonight.

holdings.infoBox: QQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.01%, Apple at 7.26%, Micron Technology at 4.78%, Microsoft at 4.49%, and Amazon.com at 4.14%.
